Item.name: Ronga Mitsetse In Locale Order Inokwira
Ronga Mitsetse Mune Yenzvimbo Order Inodzika
Cheka zvese uye EOL to Space
Find All in All Opened Documents
Bata mutsara wega wega setambo yakaparadzana
Bata mutsara wega wega setambo yakaparadzana
Bata mutsara wega wega setambo yakaparadzana
Bata mutsara wega wega setambo yakaparadzana
Manikidza saizi yefonti kusarudzwa kwematayera ese
Manikidza sarudzo yepasi pemutsara yezvitaera zvese
Vhura ine folda mu Command Prompt
Previous style of Find Mark style
Next style of Find Mark style
Copy Styled Text of All Styles
Copy Styled Chinyorwa che Tsvaga Mark maitiro
Ronga ne Type A kusvika Z
Ronga ne Type Z kusvika A
Izvi zvichabvisa nzira yekudimbudzira kubva pamurairo uyu
Dhirowa bhaa rine ruvara pane inoshanda tab
Ita yazvino nhanho yekupeta/kuvhurika mirairo inobatika
|Dzima scrolling yemhando yepamusoro nekuda kwenyaya ye touchpad
Chengetedza sarudzo kana wadzvanya-kurudyi kunze kwesarudzo
Isa ruvara rwetsika kune zvakasarudzwa kumberi
Ita kuti Sarudzo yeColumn iite Multi-Editing
Isa zvigadziriso zveChitarisiko kuC0, C1 Unicode EOL
Dzivirira kudzora hunhu (C0 kodhi) kutaipa mugwaro
Gara uchivhura gwaro idzva mukuwedzera pakutanga
Shandisa mutsara wekutanga wegwaro seusina musoro tab zita
Vhura mafaera ese efolder pane kuvhura Folder seWorkspace pane folda inodonha
Ndapota buda muNotepad++ uye wotangazve Notepad++ muAdministrator mode kuti ushandise chinhu ichi.
Backspace kiyi unindents pane kubvisa imwe nzvimbo
Shandisa monospaced font mu Tsvaga dialog (Inoda kutangazve Notepad++)
Tsvaga nhaurirano inoramba yakavhurika mushure mekutsvaga inobuda kuhwindo remhinduro
Simbisa Kutsiva Zvese muMapepa Akavhurwa Zvese
Kutsvaga Mhedzisiro hwindo: ratidza imwe chete yekupinda pamutsetse wawanikwa kana zvichibvira
Sarudza Shoko Pasi Pekuchengeta kana Hapana Chakasarudzwa
Zadza Tsvaga muFiles Directory Field Based On Active Document
: Max Characters to Auto-Zadza Tsvaga Munda kubva kuSarudzo
Gonesa snapshot yechikamu uye periodic backup
Tamba backup pane gadziriso mune yega yega
Rangarira mafaera asingasvikike kubva muchikamu chakapfuura
Open session in a new instance (and save session automatically on exit)
* The modification of this setting needs to restart Notepad++
Reverse default date time order (short long formats)
Rangarira panel state (panel yakavhurika) mune zvimwe zviitiko (multi-instance mode) kana kushandisa command line parameter [-nosession]
Delimiter yekusarudza marongero (Ctrl + Mouse tinya kaviri)
Shandisa default Word character list sezvazviri
Wedzera chimiro chako sechikamu chezwi (usazvisarudzire kunze kwekunge uchiziva zvauri kuita)
Gonesa Hombe Faira Kurambidzwa (hapana syntax inosimudzira)
Ratidza zita refaira chete mubhawa remusoro

Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kuchengetedza magwaro ese akagadziridzwa?
Sarudza "Nguva dzose hongu" kana iwe usingade kuona iyi dialog zvakare. Unogona kudzorera nhaurirano iyi muZvido pave paya.
Hapana git repository\nShandisa Bhurawuza kuvhura repo.
Iro faira rechikamu rakasarudzwa harina matab.
Rekodha macro kutanga uchishandisa Kutanga Kurekodha.
Ratidza nzira yefaira yakazara mubhawa remusoro
Find in Projects: Not yet connected to Project Panel file list.
Do you want to save changes?
Keep absent file entries in session
Confirm Replace All in open documents
Shandisa monospaced font mu Tsvaga dialog
Sarudza Notepad++ theme XML faira yekushandisa
Nhamba dzinofanira kuva 0-255 uye kutanga kunofanira kuva <= kupera.
Tangazve Notepad++ kuti ugadzirise zvakare default contextMenu.xml.
Iyo faira ine shanduko dzisina kuchengetwa.Kuisazve neiyo nyowani encoding kunovarasa.Kuenderera mberi?
Iyo repository inogona kunge iri yega.
Mafaira emutauro wekuwedzera (.xml) anogona kuiswa mu:
Skip Current amp;Enda ku Next Multi-select

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Kugadzirisa mamiriroMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Kugadzirisa mamiriro eMenu.xml kunokubvumidza kuti ugadzirise Notepad++ yako popup mamiriro. Unofanira kutangazve Notepad++ yako kuti ishande mushure mekugadzirisa contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Save Current Modification
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Iwe unofanirwa kuchengetedza iyo ikozvino shanduko. Magadzirirwo ese akachengetwa haagone kuregererwa.
Kuenderera mberi?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Lose Undo Ability Warning
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Iwe unofanirwa kuchengetedza iyo ikozvino shanduko. Magadzirirwo ese akachengetwa haagone kuregererwa.
Kuenderera mberi?

DocReloadWarning.title: Reload
DocReloadWarning.message: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kurodhazve faira razvino uye kurasikirwa neshanduko dzakaitwa muNotepad ++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Kuchengeta zvakundikana
FileLockedWarning.message: Ndokumbira utarise kana faira iri rakavhurwa mune imwe chirongwa

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Rename zvakundikana
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Zita rataurwa riri kutoshandiswa pane imwe tab.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Rename zvakundikana
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Zita rataurwa harigone kuva risina chinhu, kana kuti haringangove nenzvimbo(s) kana TAB(s).

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Huwandu hwemafaira ekuvhura hwakakurisa
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Zvirongwa paCloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Zvinoita senge nzira yezvigadziriso pagore yakaiswa pane yekuverenga chete drive, kana pane folda yaida ropafadzo yekunyora kupinda. Zvirongwa zvako mugore zvichakanzurwa.Ndokumbira ugadzirise kukosha kwakabatana uchishandisa Preference dialog.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Chiito chisiricho
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Unogona kungodonhedza mafaera kana maforodha asi kwete ese ari maviri, nekuti urikudonhedza Folder seProjekti modhi. Iwe unofanirwa kugonesa "Vhura mafaera ese efolder pane kuvhura Folder seWorkspace pane folda inodonhedza" mu "Default Directory" chikamu cheZvaunofarira dialog kuti oparesheni iyi ishande.

SortingError.title: Pakuronga Error
SortingError.message: Hatina kukwanisa kuronga nhamba nekuda kwemutsara $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleUnknown.title: Sort Failed
SortLocaleUnknown.message: Chikonzero icho rudzi rwakakundikana hachigone kuzivikanwa.

ColumnModeTip.title: Column Mode Tip
ColumnModeTip.message:
Pane nzira nhatu dzekuchinjisa kuita column-select mode:
1. (Kiyibhodhi uye Mouse) Bata Alt uchikweva kuruboshwe
2. (Kiyibhodhi chete) Bata Alt+Shift paunenge uchishandisa makiyi emiseve
3. (Kiyibhodhi kana Mbeva) Isa caret paunoda kutanga kwe column block position, ipapo shandisa "Tanga / Pedzisa Sarudza muColumn Mode" murairo; Fambisa caret kune yaunoda kumagumo eiyo column block chinzvimbo, ipapo shandisa "Tanga / Pedzisa Sarudza muColumn Mode" raira zvakare

DoCloseOrNot.title: Chengetedza faira isiripo
DoCloseOrNot.message: Iyo faira "$STR_REPLACE$" haipo. Chengeta faira iri mupepeti?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Delete file
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Iyo faira "$STR_REPLACE$" ichaendeswa kune yako Recycle Bin uye gwaro iri richavharwa. Kuenderera mberi?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Save
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Faera rako rekuchengetedza harigone kuwanikwa (radzimwa kubva kunze). Sevha kana zvisina kudaro data rako richarasika Unoda kuchengetedza faira "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Reload
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Iyi faira yakagadziridzwa neimwe chirongwa. Unoda kuirodhazve here?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Reload
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Iyi faira yakagadziridzwa neimwe chirongwa. Iwe unoda kuiisazve uye kurasikirwa neshanduko dzakaitwa muNotepad ++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Prehistoric system yaonekwa
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Zvinoita sekuti uchiri kushandisa prehistoric system.Iyi ficha inoshanda chete pane yazvino system, sorry.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Notepad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Notepad++ updater haienderane neXP nekuda kwechinyakare chekuchengetedza layer pasi peXP. Iwe unoda here kuenda kuNotepad ++ peji kurodha yazvino vhezheni?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Proxy Settings
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Ndokumbira utangezve Notepad++ muAdmin mode kugadzirisa proxy.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Monitoring dambudziko
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Gwaro rakasviba.Ndapota chengetedza shanduko usati waiongorora.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Monitoring dambudziko
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Iyo faira inofanirwa kuvepo kuti itariswe.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Dambudziko resaizi yefaira
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Faira rakakura kwazvo kuti rivhurwe neNotepad++

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Kuvhura faira hombe yambiro
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Kuvhura faira hombe ye2GB+ kunogona kutora maminetsi akati wandei. Unoda kurivhura here?

FileBackupFailed.title: Kuchengeta Kwemafaira Kwakundikana
FileBackupFailed.message:
Yambotanga yefaira haina kukwanisa kuchengetwa mudura rekushandisa pa"$STR_REPLACE$".
Unoda kuchengetedza faira iripo zvakadaro?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Configurator
LoadLangsFailed.message: Load langs.xml yatadza! Unoda kudzoreredza langs.xml yako?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Folder seWorkspace inowedzera dambudziko refolda
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: A sub-folder yefolder yaunoda kuwedzera iripo. Ndokumbira ubvise mudzi wayo kubva papaneru usati wawedzera folda "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Pane chikanganiso chaitika pakunyora faira rako repanzvimbo yebasa. Nzvimbo yako yekushandira haina kuchengetwa.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Vhura Nzvimbo Yekushanda
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Nzvimbo yekushanda yazvino yakagadziridzwa.Unoda kuchengetedza chirongwa chazvino here?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: New Workspace
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Nzvimbo yekushanda yazvino yakagadziridzwa.Unoda kuchengetedza chirongwa chazvino here?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Vhura Nzvimbo Yekushanda
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Nzvimbo yekushandira haina kukwanisa kuvhurwa. Zvinoita sekuti faira rekuvhura harisi iro purojekiti faira.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Bvisa folda kubva kuchirongwa
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Zvese zvidiki zvichabviswa. Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kubvisa folda iyi kubva mupurojekiti?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Bvisa faira kubva kuprojekiti
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kubvisa faira iri mupurojekiti?

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Reload Workspace
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Nzvimbo yekushanda yazvino yakagadziridzwa.Kurodha zvakare kunorasa zvese zvakagadziridzwa. Unoda kuenderera mberi here?

UDLNewNameError.title: UDL Error
UDLNewNameError.message: Zita iri rinoshandiswa nemumwe mutauro, ndapota ipa imwe.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Mutauro Unotsanangurwa Wemushandisi
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Usati watumira kunze kwenyika, chengetedza tsananguro yemutauro wako nekudzvanya "Save As..." bhatani.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Une chokwadi here?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima nzira yekudimbudzira iyi?

OpenInAdminMode.title: Kuchengeta zvakundikana
OpenInAdminMode.message: Iyo faira haigone kuchengetwa uye inogona kuchengetedzwa. Iwe unoda kuvhura Notepad ++ mu Administrator mode?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Kuchengeta zvakundikana
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Iyo faira haigone kuchengetwa uye inogona kuchengetedzwa. Iwe unoda kuvhura Notepad ++ mu Administrator mode?

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Notepad++ yave kuda kubuda
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Kana ukadzvanya YES, unosiya Notepad++ kuti uenderere mberi nemashandiro. Notepad ++ ichatangwa patsva mushure mekunge mabasa ese amiswa. Kuenderera mberi?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Notepad++ inoda kutangwa patsva
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Iwe unofanirwa kutangazve Notepad ++ kurodha maplugins awakaisa.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Notepad++ inoda kutangwa patsva
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Iwe unofanirwa kutangazve Notepad ++ kugonesa Shandura Nhoroondo.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Notepad++ - Windows session kubuda
WindowsSessionExit.message: Windows chikamu chave kuda kumiswa asi une imwe data isina kuchengetwa.Iwe unoda kubuda muNotepad ++ izvozvi?

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Shanduko dzisina kuchengetwa dzava kuda kuraswa! Iwe unoda kuchengetedza shanduko dzako usati wachinja matema?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Macro uye Run Commands Compatibility
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Macro yako uye Run mirairo yakachengetedzwa muNotepad ++ v.8.5.2 (kana kupfuura) inogona kunge isingaenderani neshanduro yezvino yeNotepad ++. Ndokumbira uedze iyo mirairo uye, kana zvichidikanwa, gadzirisa zvakare.
Neimwe nzira, unogona kudzikisira kuNotepad ++ v8.5.2 uye dzosera yako yapfuura data. Notepad++ ichachengetedza "shortcuts.xml" yako yekare uye chengeta se "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Kupa zita "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", mirairo yako inofanira kudzoserwa uye kushanda nemazvo.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Kuchengeta zvakundikana
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Haikwanisi kuchengetedza faira. Iyo Notepad ++ yakazara kuverenga-chete kuchengetedza yakarambidzwa mode yakadzivirira iyo faira kuti isachengetedzwe.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Kuchengeta zvakundikana
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: Tatadza kuchengetedza faira. Zvinoita sekunge hapana nzvimbo yakakwana padhisiki yekuchengetedza faira.Faera rako harina kuchengetwa.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Faira haisvikiki
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Mamwe mafaera echikamu chako chaakachengeta nemaoko "$STR_REPLACE$" haapindike.Anogona kuvhurwa asina chinhu uye ekuverenga-chete zvinyorwa sezvibatiso.
Unoda kugadzira zvibatiso izvozvo?
CHERECHEDZA: Kusarudza kusagadzira zvibatiso kana kuvavhara gare gare, chikamu chako chakachengetwa nemaoko HACHIZOGWADZWA pakubuda.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Faira haisvikiki
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Mamwe mafaera echikamu chako chapfuura haasvikiki.Anogona kuvhurwa asina chinhu uye ekuverenga-chete zvinyorwa sezvibatiso.
Unoda kugadzira zvibatiso izvozvo?
CHERECHEDZA: Kusarudza kusagadzira vanobatisa nzvimbo kana kuvavhara gare gare, chikamu chako CHICHAKAKONZWA PAKUBUDA!Tinokurudzira kuti uchengetedze "session.xml" yako izvozvi.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Haikwanise kumhanya RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL haienderani neDirectWrite modhi.Ndokumbira dzima DirectWrite modhi muMISC.chikamu cheZvido dialog, uye tangazve Notepad ++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Kunze: File memory allocation yakundikana
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Panogona kunge pasina kukwana kwemahara ndangariro yefaira iri kutakurwa neNotepad ++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Regex backward search yadzimwa
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Nekumisikidza, tsvakiridzo yeregex yekudzokera kumashure inodzimwa nekuda kwezvingangove zvabuda.Kuti uite tsvakiridzo yekumashure, vhura iyo Tsvaga nhaurirano wosarudza ingave yakajairika kana yakawedzerwa maitiro ekutsvagisa pane kutaura nguva dzose. Dzvanya bhatani re OK kuti uvhure iyo Tsvaga dialog kana kuisa pfungwa pairi.
Kana iwe uchida iyo yekumashure regex yekutsvaga chimiro, bvunza bhuku remushandisi kuti uwane mirairo yekuigonesa.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Yambiro yekutsvaga
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: "Mukusarudza" cheki bhokisi mamiriro agadziridzwa otomatiki. Ndokumbira utarise mamiriro ekutsvaga usati waita chiito.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Notepad++ inoda kutangwazve
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Notepad ++ inoda kutangwazve kuratidza mapfupi emenyu.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Kuchinja faira rekuverenga-chete zvaramba
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Ndokumbirawo mumhanye Notepad ++ semaneja kuti uchinje faira hunhu.

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Sarudza dhairekitori rekuwedzera muFolder sePabasa repanzvimbo

word-chars-list-tip.value: Izvi zvinokutendera kuti ubatanidze mamwe mavara mumavara azvino emazwi uchidzvanya kaviri kuti usarudze kana kutsvaga ne "Match whole word only" sarudzo yakatariswa.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Enda pakanzi Style Configurator kuti uchinje iyo yagara iripo yerudzi rweEOL ("EOL custom color")..

cloud-restart-warning.value: Ndokumbira utangezve Notepad ++ kuti iite kushanda.

cloud-select-folder.value: Sarudza folda kubva/kuenda kune Notepad++ inoverenga/inonyora marongero ayo

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Tsvaga mu cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Tsvaga mune ese mafaera kunze kwe exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Tsvaga mumafaira ese asi usasanganise maforodha bvunzo, bin bin64: *.* !\test !\bin*
Tsvaga mumafaira ese asi usasanganise ese maforodha log kana matanda achidzokorodza: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Zadza Directory munda zvichibva pane inoshanda gwaro

find-status-top-reached.value: Tsvaga: Yakasvika gwaro kutanga, yekutanga kuitika kubva pazasi yakawanikwa.

find-status-end-reached.value: Tsvaga: Yasvika kumagumo egwaro, yekutanga kuitika kubva kumusoro yawanikwa.

find-status-invalid-re.value: Tsvaga: Matauriro enguva dzose asina kunaka

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Tsiva Zvese: Haikwanise kutsiva mavara.Gwaro riripo rinoverengwa chete

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Tsiva: Yakasvika kumagumo egwaro, yakatanga kubva kumusoro.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Tsiva: Yakasvika gwaro kutanga, yakatanga kubva pasi.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Tsiva: 1 chiitiko chakatsiviwa.Hapana zvimwe zviitiko zvakawanikwa.

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Tsiva: Haikwanise kutsiva mavara.Gwaro riripo rinoverengwa chete

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Chiitiko chakapihwa hachigone kuwanikwa.Unogona kunge wakanganwa kutarisa "Pembera" (ku ON), "Match kesi" (ku OFF), kana "Batanidza izwi rose chete" (KUTI ZVIMWE).

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Mavara asingaonekwe akanamirwa "Find what" or "Replace with" zvirimo

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Yambiro: Mabhii asingaonekwe mundima yekutsvaga (kana kutsiva). Mavara akanamirwa mundima iyi anosanganisira asingaoneki (pamwe mutsara-anopera) mavara.Kana iwe ukaenderera usina kudzidzima, ichaverengerwa mukutsvaga (kana kutsiva) mavara.

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kutsiva zvese zvinoitika mu:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Iwe unoda kutsiva zvese zvinoitika mumagwaro ese mune akasarudzwa Project Panel(s)?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Une chokwadi chekuti unoda kutsiva zvese zvinoitika mumagwaro ese akavhurwa?

find-result-title-info-extra.value: |- Mutsetse Sefa Modhi: ratidza chete zvakasefa zvabuda

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: Yasvika pamusoro pepeji, inoenderera kubva pasi

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: Yasvika kumagumo epeji, inoenderera kubva kumusoro

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Mamwe maficha anogona kunonoka kuita mumafaira makuru.Aya maficha anogona kuvharwa otomatiki pakuvhura faira hombe.Unogona kuzvigadzirisa pano.
CHERECHEDZA: 1. Kugadzirisa sarudzo pano kunoda kuvhura zvakare akavhurwa mafaera akakura kuti uwane maitiro akanaka.
2. Kana "Deactivate Word Wrap pasi rose" yakatariswa uye iwe ukavhura faira hombe, "Word Wrap" ichadzimwa kune ese mafaera.Unogona kuigonesa zvakare kuburikidza nemenu "Tarisa-> Kuputira Shoko".

npcNote-tip.value:
Mumiriri weakasarudzwa "asiri-ASCII" whitespace uye asiri-kudhinda (control) mavara.
CHERECHEDZA: Kushandisa chinomiririra kuchadzima mavara emavara pamavara.
Kuti uwane runyorwa ruzere rwemavara machena akasarudzwa uye asiri-adhinda tarisa Mushandisi Manual.
Dzvanya pabhatani iri kuti uvhure webhusaiti neMushandisi Manual.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Kudimburira : zita NBSP: hapana-kuputsa nzvimbo ZWSP: zero-upamhi nzvimbo ZWNBSP : zero-width hapana-break space
Kuti uwane runyorwa rwakazara tarisa Mushandisi Manual. Dzvanya pa "?"bhatani riri kurudyi kuti uvhure webhusaiti neMushandisi Manual.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint: zita U+00A0 : hapana-kuputsa nzvimbo U+200B: nzvimbo yakafara zero U+FEFF : zero-upamhi hapana-break nzvimbo
Kuti uwane runyorwa rwakazara tarisa Mushandisi Manual. Dzvanya pa "?"bhatani riri kurudyi kuti uvhure webhusaiti neMushandisi Manual.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Enda kuSitaera Configurator kuti uchinje iyo yakasarudzika ruvara rwemavara echena akasarudzwa uye asiri-anodhinda mavara ("Asina-kudhinda mavara tsika ruvara").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Isa zvigadziriso zvemavara asina kudhinda kuC0, C1 control uye Unicode EOL (inotevera mutsara, mutsara wekuparadzanisa uye kupatsanura ndima) mavara.

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Nhamba shoma yemavara akasarudzwa munzvimbo yekugadziridza kuti utarise otomatiki "Mukusarudza" bhokisi rekutarisa kana iyo Tsvaga dialog yaitwa.Iko kukosha kwakanyanya i$INT_REPLACE$.Isa kukosha ku0 kudzima auto-checking.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Nhamba yepamusoro yemavara akasarudzwa munharaunda yekugadziridza kuti uzadze otomatiki "Tsvaga chii" ndima kana Ctrl-F yatanga.Iko kukosha kwepamusoro i$INT_REPLACE$, inova saizi yepamusoro ye "Find what" ndima, inoganhurwa nehurongwa.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Wedzera yako column marker nekuratidza nzvimbo yayo nenhamba yedesimali.Unogona kutsanangura akati wandei makoramu nekushandisa chena nzvimbo kuparadzanisa nhamba dzakasiyana.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Bata Shift uchidzvanya Sevha kuti uvhure kopi mushure mekuchengetedza.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Ita shuwa kuti indentation yemutsara wazvino (kureva mutsara mutsva wakagadzirwa nekudzvanya ENTER kiyi) inofanana nekudzika kwemutsara wapfuura.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Gonesa smart indentation ye "C-like" mitauro uye Python.Mitauro ye "C-like" inosanganisira: C, C++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell uye JSON.
Kana ukasarudza advanced mode asi ukasagadzirisa mafaera mumitauro yambotaurwa, indentation inoramba iri mubasic mode.

global-override-tip.value: Kugonesa "Global override" pano kuchadarika iyo parameter mumataera ese emitauro.Zvaungade chaizvo kushandisa "Default Style" zvigadziriso panzvimbo

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Inogona kunatsiridza kupa kweakakosha mavara kana kugadzirisa dzimwe nyaya dzemifananidzo, tangazve Notepad ++ kushandisa shanduko.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: |Iyi sarudzo inoita kuti zvidhori zvako zvitevedze Windows system accent color.Accent color ndiyo inosimudzira ruvara inoshandiswa mumabhatani, miganhu, uye Start menyu mataira muWindows.Kuti uchinje, enda kuSettings> Personalization> Colors, wobva wasarudza yako yaunofarira accent color.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Kureba kwapfuurwa: Zvauri kupinza zvinogona kudarika zvinobvumidzwa uye zvinogona kunge zvakadimburwa, uye hazvizochengetwa pachikamu chinotevera.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Zvawataura zvinogona kudarika zvinobvumidzwa uye zvinogona kunge zvakadimburwa, uye hazvizochengetwa pachikamu chinotevera.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Hurefu hwezvauchaisa hwakareba uye hunogona kusachengetwa pachikamu chako chinotevera.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Inomisa hurefu hunooneka hwemazita ematebhu marefu.Pinda kushandisa kukosha kwakapihwa.Kukosha kwemhando: 1-257 mavara (0 inodzima kuderedzwa).
